name: crowdsec-web-ui
description: A web UI for CrowdSec alerts and decisions

scripts.install-all: bun install && cd frontend && bun install
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:frontend
scripts.coverage: bun run coverage:backend && bun run coverage:frontend && bun run coverage:check
scripts.coverage:backend: bun test src/backend/config.test.ts src/backend/lapi.test.ts src/backend/update-check.test.ts src/backend/utils --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/backend
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:backend && bun run typecheck:frontend
scripts.verify: bun run test && bun run coverage && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run build-ui
